actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Knox, who teed off with Rickie Fowler and Hideki Matsuyama, is four over on 76 after two bogeys and a double bogey in his back nine at Augusta National.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: An analysis of 24.5 million MOT records by website Honest John found that headlamps and tyre tread depth were the most common faults.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Kendal Mountain Festival, which was held on the 17- 20 November, attracted 14,000 visitors and generated £2m in visitor spend in and around the town.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Watford midfielder Watson has been in the first team for the first season back in the Premier League.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ms Brewster, 32, from Sheffield, was among 22 people who died in the suicide bomb attack at an Ariana Grande concert at Manchester Arena in May.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Huge Holiday Homes wanted to convert the building in the centre of Dolgellau into apartments catering for up to 56 visitors.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Sung carded a one-under-par 71 to end the third round at 17 under.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Barry O'Reilly, 37, died after an incident at Claremont Farm on Clatterbridge Old Road in Spital, Wirral, on 15 May.

actions.text: Referee Bobby Madden inspected the pitch around 13:15 GMT and judged it to be unfit for play, with several areas covered in water.

actions.text: The music mogul was in the master bedroom of the house in Holland Park when the alleged raid took place on 4 December last year at 01:30 GMT.
